title: schefflera subavenis
intro: Schefflera subavenis, also known as the Yellow Variegated Schefflera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schefflera subavenis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
